findings.description: The source code example includes the comment `//必要に応じてConfigurationへその他の設定を行う` inside the `createObject()` method, indicating that developers should add other Configuration settings as needed. This guidance comment is omitted from the knowledge file's code block.
findings.source_evidence: Source createObject() method contains: `cfg.setDefaultEncoding(encoding); //必要に応じてConfigurationへその他の設定を行う`

findings.description: `ConfigurationFactory` is a PascalCase class name prominently featured in s2 (as the recommended implementation class to create) but is absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source section defines and names `ConfigurationFactory` as the example class implementing `ComponentFactory<Configuration>`
